reviews.review_title: Nice to see a pool in my garden
reviews.review_description:
Nice to see a pool in my garden would have loved to swim in it.
Found the placing it very sensitive would be nice to lock the position. 
Would love to see more features added.
Thanks

developer_response.body: Thanks GDtomo!  We'd love to chat more with you, please reach out to us at meta-apps@fairworlds.com
